race.comment: ONLYYOUCANREAD (1) came home strongly beaten a neck, over 1200m at Ipswich on debut. Fitter and only has to repeat that level of effort to go one better. YEAH BUDDY (2) is close to breaking through. Finished a nose away in second over 1200m at this track last time racing forward. Measures right up and will go close. SPOILT ROTTEN (5) comes out of the same race beaten 2.3L making good improvement. Peaks and can get into the finish. TUESDAY (10) is an improver and is going well enough to feature. Rolls up on a 7-day return and should get her chance. MISTER MIGHTY (4) resumes and would be in the mix if presented forward.
